title: Earthworks Unofficial Extended Life
description: A fork of a mod that aims to add earthen and ancient and prehistoric inspired building materials to Minecraft.
body:
This is a Fork of  "[Earthworks](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/earthworks)" since it didn't receive an update in forever.   ![](http://imgur.com/ivOhQOp.png) **Original Description:**   Earthworks aims to add earthen and ancient and prehistoric inspired building materials to Minecraft. Taking cues from the Stone Age, Bronze Age, and Iron Age, Earthworks adds some of the first materials mankind used to craft.  Materials like wattle and daub, wicker, rammed earth, and adobe bricks.  These are crude materials, fashioned out of what was at hand, and easily accessible, but prove to be as strong as stone when fashioned properly.  Utilizing these in an early build will provide some excellent shelters. Some materials you will have to work harder for, such as concrete, cinder blocks, or cordwood, but these materials will prove expansive, and help you to forge a great empire like our Roman ancestors.  These materials will yield more when crafted, pushing your roads and aqueducts further and further.   Link to the original mod: https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/earthworks    **Materials**
  • Adobe
  • Chalk
  • Cinder Blocks
  • Cob
  • Concrete
  • Cordwood
  • Dry Fitted Stone
  • Gabions - Dirt, Sand, and Gravel filled
  • Lath and Plaster
  • Mud
  • Rammed Earth
  • Reed
  • Slate - Blue, Purple, and Green
  • Slate Tiles - Blue, Purple, and Green
  • Slate Shingles - Blue, Purple, and Green
  • Thatch
  • Timber
  • Vertical Planks
  • Wattle and Daub
  • Wicker
  • Wood Shakes
  **Features:**
  • Low Cost/Early Game - Blocks like wattle and daub, rammed earth, and adobe offer stone like protection a cheap cost.
  • Walls, Slabs, Stairs - Every block comes with walls, slabs, and stairs for all sorts of building options!
  • Blast Resistance - Dry fitted stone offers blast resistance just shy of that of obsidian.
  • Timber Framing - Fully customizable set of timber framed wattle & daub and plaster blocks.  Each infill type  comes with 39 separate, fully rotatable pattern, for hundreds if not thousands of possible designs.
  • Carpenters Tools - To rotate your timber framed blocks around in world with a shift right click.
  • Wicker Gabions - These blocks will collapse like gravel or sand when shift right clicked with an empty hand, or on a redstone impulse.
  **Credits:** * Alsender - Original Author of the Mod * FreneticScribbler - for creating a pull request 3 years ago, that was implemented in this version   [**![](https://files.readme.io/f10e57c-Diamond_Shaped3.png)**](https://www.akliz.net/enderman)   This mod is published under Attribution-NonCommercial-ShareAlike 4.0 International (CC BY-NC-SA 4.0). (Same license Alsender originally choose.)
